creator: yanegomi@gmail.com
text:
On Sun, Jan 16, 2011 at 1:18 PM, Garrett Cooper <yanegomi@gmail.com> wrote:
> =A0 =A0Here's a patch for mknod(2)/mknodat(2). Only one source file in
> base was incorrect (cp(1)) and all of the other source files that used
> mknod(2) had sys/stat.h in there already.

    Just as a comment, jilles@ pointed out to me that bin/cp/utils.c
was already including sys/stat.h . So only the manpage needs to be
updated.
Thanks,
-Garrett
